author: Grace Kay
title: And then there were none: Musk's last xAI cofounder is out
description: Elon Musk is shaking up xAI ahead of the SpaceX IPO. All 11 of his cofounders are gone, 8 of them since January.
content:
Elon Musk has said xAI is being "rebuilt from the foundations up."Adrees Latif/Reuters
  • Elon Musk started xAI with 11 cofounders in 2023.

author: Samantha Subin
title: The Iran war is defense tech's chance to shine, but few systems and weapons are ready
description: Palmer Luckey's Anduril, software AI company Palantir and Elon Musk's SpaceX are getting the lion's share of defense tech dollars from the Pentagon.
content:
The Iran war is redefining modern combat for the U.S. and driving demand for lower-cost tech.
It's the exact situation Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth warned against a few months ago.
